subject: Trevenant, a spectral tree-creature Pokemon with a dark hollow trunk body, glowing red eye, and grasping branch-limbs
description: Trevenant occupies most of the frame as a looming dark presence. The body is a hollow, gnarled tree trunk with long branch-like limbs reaching outward. A single glowing red eye is visible in the dark hollow of the trunk. The coloring is very dark — deep greens, blacks, and muted browns — with sparse ghostly or spectral lighter elements. The background suggests a dark forest or shadowed woodland setting. The overall mood is eerie and threatening, the figure taking up most of the vertical space in the composition.
foreground: Trevenant, dark tree-trunk body, branch-limbs reaching out, single red glowing eye
